disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, painless passage of a large volume of bright red blood per rectum with clots, roughly one hour ago
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me exactly what happened?
How much blood was there and what colour was it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I went to the toilet and the whole bowl was bright red with clots — a huge amount, all at once, and there was no pain at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe lightheadedness, weakness, sweating and near-fainting, worse on sitting up (circulatory compromise proxy)
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Do you feel faint or like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel like I'm going to pass out — really weak and dizzy and sweaty. If I try to sit up it gets much worse, so I'm lying flat with my legs up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No abdominal pain, no cramps, no tenesmus, no vomiting and no haematemesis; a normal bowel motion earlier the same day
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any tummy pain or cramps?
Have you vomited or brought up any blood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my tummy doesn't hurt at all — no cramps, nothing. I haven't been sick or brought up any blood. My bowels were completely normal earlier today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Takes daily low-dose aspirin (antiplatelet) for cardiovascular prevention
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular medicines?
Are you on any blood thinners or aspirin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I take one low-dose aspirin every day to protect my heart.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known incidental diverticulosis (pouches in the bowel found by chance about 5 years ago, previously asymptomatic)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any bowel conditions the doctors have found before?
Have you had any tests on your bowel in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They found little pouches in my bowel by chance about 5 years ago, but they've never caused me any trouble until now.
